column1: Gateway Distripacks is an integrated inter-modal logistics service provider. It has a network of 9 Inland Container Depots and Container Freight Stations strategically located across the country, operating a fleet of 34 trainsets along with 500+ trailers for transportation between its facilities and maritime ports, as well as first & last mile connectivity to provide end to end solutions to the EXIM industry. The company offers general & bonded warehousing, rail & road transportation, container handling services and other value added services.
